title: Diagonal Crafts
description: Craft any Tool however you want! Straight or... Diagonal?
body:
**Have you ever tried to craft sword or pickaxe diagonally and were disappointed because you couldn't do that? well, now you can.**

_All diagonal recipes will be shown in recipe book (if anyone doesn't want that, i might fix it in future)_

May or may not work on 1.20.2-1.20.6 (it should, but i haven't tested it. 1.20.1 works properly) the mod is experimental.

![diagonal sword recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9c45bf8efa0c579d14f0cd13b1f46920426991e.png)

![diagonal pickaxe recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/254fddee38aa87c2d0418bf851cecbce63d31e17.png)
